name: Urea
used_for: High-nitrogen fertilizer (46% N) used to boost leafy, vegetative growth and green colour; apply as a top dressing in split doses.

name: DAP
used_for: Di-ammonium phosphate supplying nitrogen and phosphorus; used as a basal dose at sowing to promote strong root and early shoot development.

name: NPK
used_for: Balanced compound fertilizer providing nitrogen, phosphorus and potassium together for all-round crop growth and yield.

name: Compost
used_for: Decomposed organic matter that improves soil structure, water holding and microbial life while supplying slow-release nutrients.

name: Manure
used_for: Well-rotted animal dung that enriches soil with organic matter and a broad range of nutrients; improves fertility over time.

name: Ammonium Sulphate
used_for: Nitrogen fertilizer (21% N) that also supplies sulphur; good for alkaline soils as it has a mild acidifying effect.

name: Ammonium Nitrate
used_for: Fast-acting nitrogen source with both nitrate and ammonium forms; used for quick green-up where rapid nitrogen is needed.

name: Triple Superphosphate
used_for: Concentrated phosphate fertilizer used as a basal dose to support root growth, flowering and fruit or grain set.
